summary: Tested ProposalView page fixes for hiding flights when not selected, displaying hotel with image from selectedRoom.images, showing day-wise itinerary with transfers/activities. All core functionality tests PASS. Minor fix applied to hotel image path.

issues: React hydration warning about <tr>/<span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

flights_hidden_when_not_booked.details: Flights section (data-testid='flights-section') is NOT rendered in DOM when proposal has flights_booked=false and no arrival/departure_flight_info

sidebar_no_flights_entry.details: Left sidebar 'TRIP OVERVIEW' does NOT show 'Flights' entry when no flights are selected

hotel_no_selection_message.details: Hotel section shows 'No hotel selected for {city}' message with icon when no hotel in selected_hotels

hotel_image_from_selectedRoom.details: Fixed hotel image path to check selectedRoom.images as fallback: hotel.image || hotel.images?.[0] || hotel.selectedRoom?.images?.[0]

day_cards_no_transfer_message.details: 'No arrival transfer selected' and 'No departure transfer selected' messages displayed correctly

day_cards_expand_collapse.details: Expand All Days button toggles between '+ EXPAND ALL DAYS' and '- COLLAPSE ALL DAYS'

activity_cards_display.details: Activity cards show name (Dubai City Tour), VIEW button, duration (4 hours), and highlight badges (Dubai Museum, Gold Souk, etc.)

travel_insurance_section.details: Travel Insurance section renders with '$50,000 coverage' and 'Not Included' status

download_pdf_button.details: Download PDF button (data-testid='download-pdf-btn') visible and accessible in header

critical_code_review_comments: Flights section conditional at line 786: (proposal.flights_booked === true || proposal.arrival_flight_info || proposal.departure_flight_info) - correctly hides when no flight data
Sidebar 'Flights' entry conditional at line 176-179 uses same logic - correctly hidden
Hotel section fallback at line 1118-1125 shows 'No hotel selected' message with helpful text
FIX APPLIED: Hotel image at line 1011 now checks selectedRoom.images as fallback
Day cards correctly show 'No arrival/departure transfer selected' when transfer data is null
Activity cards properly display name, duration, highlights (as badges), inclusions, and VIEW button

fix_details.change: Added hotel.selectedRoom?.images?.[0] as fallback in hotel image src chain to support hotel data where images are only in selectedRoom

proposals_tested.proposal_without_flights_hotels: Trip to Dubai (1B00D8B) - flights_booked=false, no hotels, no activities
proposals_tested.proposal_with_activities: Trip to Dubai (711ef597) - has Dubai City Tour activity with highlights
proposals_tested.proposal_with_hotel: Trip to Tbilisi (185e3a02) - has Horizont Hotel with room images and activities

context_for_next_testing_agent: ProposalView page now correctly: 1) Hides flights section when flights_booked=false and no flight info exists, 2) Shows 'No hotel selected' when selected_hotels is empty, 3) Displays hotel image from selectedRoom.images if hotel.image/images is null, 4) Shows 'No arrival/departure transfer selected' messages, 5) Displays activity cards with name, duration, highlights badges, and inclusions. Test flow: Login -> My Leads -> My Proposals -> View Proposal
